content.question: What is the actual pedagogical effect (value-added) of 6/8-year gimnázium attendance net of selection effects? Do students who enter at age 10 and progress in these schools learn more than comparable-ability peers in regular secondary schools?
content.reduction_path: Commission a matched or regression-discontinuity study comparing progress trajectories of students accepted to vs. rejected from 6/8-year tracks using national assessment data; interview elite-school heads and state secondary teachers on pedagogical differentiation; compare results to PISA sub-group analysis
